genre_refs: Truth Social / Twitter post screenshot format
description: A designed, clean white quote-card formatted to look like a Truth Social / X social-media post from President Donald J. Trump, shared by the Rapid Response 47 account. At the top is a circular profile avatar showing a stylized patriotic Trump figure over an American-flag background, next to the name 'Donald J. Trump' with a magenta verified checkmark and a black '+' badge, and the handle '@realDonaldTrump'. Below in large black sans-serif body text is a militaristic statement attacking the press and Iran: 'When the Fake News says that the Iranian enemy is doing well, Militarily, against us, it's virtual TREASON in that it is such a false, and even preposterous, statement. They are aiding and abetting the enemy! All it does is give Iran false hope when none should exist. These are American cowards that are rooting against our Country. Iran had 159 ships in their Navy — Every single ship is now resting at the bottom of the sea. They have no Navy, their Air Force is gone, all Technology is gone, their “leaders” are no longer with us, and the Country is an Economic Disaster. Only Losers, Ingrates, and Fools are able to make a case against America! President DONALD J. TRUMP'. The propaganda technique is the amplification of a presidential social-media post as a shareable graphic, using triumphalist war rhetoric and accusations of treason against critics/media. Target audience: pro-Trump base, war-supportive nationalists.
notable_text: '...it's virtual TREASON...They are aiding and abetting the enemy!'; 'Iran had 159 ships in their Navy — Every single ship is now resting at the bottom of the sea.'; 'Only Losers, Ingrates, and Fools are able to make a case against America!'
